title: Exline Tweaks
description: compress coal blocks into diamond shards
body: This mod adds several changes. -One new item, diamond fragment is crafted with 9 coal blocks and can craft a diamond with 9 shards. -Craft string from wool. -There are many new furnace recipes so you can recycle almost every item that is crafted with iron, gold and diamonds. -Villagers drop emeralds on death
